title: chore(deps): update dependency tslint-react to v4
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| tslint-react | devDependencies | major | [`3.6.0` -> `4.0.0`](https://diff.intrinsic.com/tslint-react/3.6.0/4.0.0) | [source](https://togithub.com/palantir/tslint-react) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>palantir/tslint-react</summary>

### [`v4.0.0`](https://togithub.com/palantir/tslint-react/releases/4.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/palantir/tslint-react/compare/3.6.0...4.0.0)

-   BREAKING: drop support for TS < 2.8 (we're now using [tsutils 3.x](https://togithub.com/ajafff/tsutils/releases/tag/v3.0.0))
-   [bugfix] `jsx-curly-spacing` fix false positive with render props ([#​140](https://togithub.com/palantir/tslint-react/issues/140))
-   [bugfix] `jsx-key` fix error detection in parenthesized expression ([#​181](https://togithub.com/palantir/tslint-react/issues/181))
-   [bugfix] `jsx-wrap-multiline` fix for closing parenthesis ([#​194](https://togithub.com/palantir/tslint-react/issues/194))
-   [enhancement] `jsx-space-before-trailing-slash` add auto fixer ([#​182](https://togithub.com/palantir/tslint-react/issues/182))
-   [enhancement] `jsx-self-close` add auto fixer ([#​189](https://togithub.com/palantir/tslint-react/issues/189))

</details>
